action_items.description: Gemma-2-2B results are promised in abstract and Section 4.6 but not actually presented. Remove all cross-architecture generalization claims or integrate actual results.
specific_fixes: Remove 'cross-model replication' from abstract contributions
Remove Section 4.6 or present actual Gemma-2-2B quantitative results
Remove 'cross-architecture generalization' from Section 6.2 limitations

action_items.issue: Non-absorbed baseline comparison uses different conditions
action_items.description: Section 4.5 claims absorbed high-CV features match non-absorbed (0.097 vs 0.102) but this uses 3 prompts while main H1 experiment at +5 shows 0.522. Comparison is not valid.
specific_fixes: Option A: Rerun non-absorbed baseline with identical 5 prompts and +3/+5/+7 strengths
Option B: Qualify claim as 'preliminary under reduced prompt set (3 prompts)' and note the 0.522 vs 0.097 discrepancy
Update Section 4.5 interpretation to acknowledge the different conditions

action_items.description: Decoder orthogonality was hypothesized but falsified. Paper doesn't explain why orthogonality was proposed or what falsification implies for the routing mechanism.
specific_fixes: Add brief paragraph in Section 3 or 5 explaining why orthogonality was hypothesized (decoder geometry as proxy for signal cleanliness)
Discuss what the null result implies (routing operates at activation level, not decoder level)
Acknowledge this constrains the bypass/mediated routing interpretation

action_items.description: H4 claims absorbed features have higher CV than non-absorbed (733x ratio). But high/low CV classification is derived from the same features - this is circular given CV > 1.0 classification.
specific_fixes: Remove 'paradox' framing from H4 and Section 3.1
Simply report 'absorbed features exhibit higher CV than non-absorbed' without calling it a paradox
The genuine discovery is H1 (CV predicts steering), not H4 (absorbed have high CV)

action_items.issue: Effect size discrepancy between pilot and full experiment unexplained
action_items.description: Pilot showed 0.153 vs 0.075 (2x). Full experiment showed 0.522 vs 0.355 (1.47x). Effect sizes increased 5x but ratio decreased. No explanation provided.
specific_fixes: Add explanation in Section 4.3 or 5.3: likely due to different feature sets/prompts between pilot and full experiment
Or acknowledge this as a limitation of sequential pilot-to-full validation

action_items.issue: Fano factor control mentioned but not executed
action_items.description: Methodology.md mentions controlling for decoder magnitude using Fano factor (CV²/mean) but this was never tested or discussed.
specific_fixes: Either execute Fano factor analysis or remove from methodology.md discussion
If not executed, note in limitations that magnitude control is future work

action_items.issue: Methodology.md validation status table is outdated
action_items.description: Table shows full_activation_patching as 'COMPLETED' but doesn't list full_decoder_orthogonality or full_non_absorbed_baseline.
specific_fixes: Update validation status table to reflect actual completed experiments
Add full_decoder_orthogonality: COMPLETED
Add full_non_absorbed_baseline: COMPLETED
Note full_cross_architecture: INCOMPLETE

action_items.description: Sentence 'Why do JumpReLU and ReLU SAEs produce projection absorption rates that differ by only 7.7 percentage points?' appears to reference a different paper or analysis not presented.
specific_fixes: Remove or clarify this sentence
If this is a remnant from a different analysis, remove it

action_items.issue: Domain specificity claim for Basu et al. is post-hoc
action_items.description: Paper suggests clinical features may be predominantly low-CV explaining Basu et al.'s universal failure, but no CV data from their features is provided.
specific_fixes: Either obtain Basu et al. feature CVs for comparison, or
Soften claim: 'may reflect domain-specific sampling without direct evidence'
Remove definitive claims about clinical features being low-CV

top_priority: Fix non-absorbed baseline comparison conditions or qualify the claim
Remove or complete cross-architecture validation claims
